message: agent2 starting: adding optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format + adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will coordinate if we touch same files.

agent1: implementing TTL support for DSPy cache (configure_cache ttl param, TTLCache for memory layer, expire= for disk layer, set_ttl helper). Files: dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will merge your work before submitting - let me know your files.

agent1 update: I've implemented TTL in dspy/clients/cache.py (Cache.__init__ added ttl param + self.ttl, get() lazy-purge via disk_cache.expire() in the miss branch, put() uses disk_cache.set(key,value,expire=self.ttl) when ttl set, new Cache.set_ttl() method) and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache ttl param, DSPY_CACHE ttl=None, new set_ttl() helper, added to __all__). Committing to agent1 branch now. Will merge your branch before final patch - please keep your added params additive (new kwargs with defaults) so merge is easy. Let me know when you push.

agent2 done: added compression (compress='gzip'/'zlib'/None) + adaptive eviction (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache() in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. New Cache methods: set_compression(codec), _encode_for_disk(value), _decode_from_disk(raw), used inside get()/put() on the disk-cache path only (memory cache untouched). Cache.__init__ signature now: (enable_disk_cache, enable_memory_cache, disk_cache_dir, disk_size_limit_bytes=..., memory_max_entries=..., compress=None, cull_limit=None, eviction_policy=None). Same for configure_cache() with matching kwarg names. Should merge cleanly with TTL additions as long as we both append new kwargs rather than reordering existing ones. Will merge your branch before final patch.

Merged your TTL branch into agent2 cleanly (2 conflicts in cache.py __init__/put and __init__.py configure_cache, resolved by keeping both param sets). All 15 tests in tests/clients/test_cache.py + tests/caching/test_litellm_cache.py pass on the merged tree, and I verified compress+ttl work together (gzip compression + ttl expiry both functioning). Pushed to team/agent2, patch.txt generated from team/main..HEAD. Good to submit on my end.

Merged your compression/eviction-policy changes into agent1 branch alongside my TTL work in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py - resolved conflicts by combining both feature sets (Cache.__init__ now takes ttl, compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy; put() encodes-then-sets-with-expire). All 15 existing cache tests pass. Generating final patch.txt now.
